requirement_topic.en: SUBTEL Mandatory Homologación — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment (Ley 18.168)
requirement_topic.zh: SUBTEL强制归一化——无线电和电信终端设备（Ley 18.168）
requirement_topic.zht: SUBTEL強制歸一化——無線電和電信終端裝置（Ley 18.168）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Chile must obtain SUBTEL (Subsecretaría de Telecomunicaciones) homologación under Ley de Telecomunicaciones (Ley 18.168) and applicable SUBTEL resolutions. The homologación process requires a technical file and accredited laboratory test reports demonstrating compliance with Chilean RF and telecom terminal requirements. SUBTEL accepts IEC and EN test reports as a technical basis, but a distinct Chilean SUBTEL certificate with a SUBTEL homologación number is mandatory — CE marking and FCC authorisation are not recognised by SUBTEL as substitutes. CCC is not referenced in Chilean regulations. The SUBTEL homologación number must appear on the product label. Spanish language labelling is required.
summary.zh: 在智利进口或销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，须依据《电信法》（Ley 18.168）及适用的SUBTEL决议取得SUBTEL（电信次秘书处）归一化。归一化流程须提供技术文件及认可实验室出具的证明符合智利无线电和电信终端要求的测试报告。SUBTEL接受IEC和EN测试报告作为技术依据，但须另行取得载有SUBTEL归一化编号的智利SUBTEL证书——CE标志和FCC授权不被SUBTEL视为替代。CCC在智利法规中无参考。SUBTEL归一化编号须标注在产品标签上。须使用西班牙语标签。
summary.zht: 在智利進口或銷售的所有無線電和電信終端裝置，須依據《電信法》（Ley 18.168）及適用的SUBTEL決議取得SUBTEL（電信次秘書處）歸一化。歸一化流程須提供技術文件及認可實驗室出具的證明符合智利無線電和電信終端要求的測試報告。SUBTEL接受IEC和EN測試報告作為技術依據，但須另行取得載有SUBTEL歸一化編號的智利SUBTEL證書——CE標誌和FCC授權不被SUBTEL視為替代。CCC在智利法規中無參考。SUBTEL歸一化編號須標注在產品標籤上。須使用西班牙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: Ley de Telecomunicaciones No. 18.168 (Chile) — mandatory homologación for radio and telecom terminal equipment
SUBTEL Resolutions on technical requirements for radio and telecom equipment type approval
SUBTEL homologación certificate with SUBTEL number (mandatory on product label)
IEC/EN test reports (accepted as technical basis; Chilean homologación still required)

summary.en: China requires MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL / MIIT telecom equipment certification) and SRRC radio type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment, tested against Chinese GB and YD/T standards. CCC applies to certain listed categories. These Chinese approvals are specific to Chinese regulatory requirements and are not recognised by SUBTEL; a separate Chilean homologación is mandatory in addition to any Chinese approvals held.
summary.zh: 中国对无线电和电信终端设备要求工信部网络进入许可（NAL/工信部电信设备认证）和SRRC无线电型式核准，依据中国GB和YD/T标准进行测试。CCC适用于特定列明类别。这些中国核准专属于中国监管要求，不被SUBTEL承认；除持有的任何中国核准外，仍须另行取得智利归一化。
summary.zht: 中國對無線電和電信終端裝置要求工業和信息化部網絡進入許可（NAL/工信部電信裝置認證）和SRRC無線電型式核准，依據中國GB和YD/T標準進行測試。CCC適用於特定列明類別。這些中國核准專屬於中國監管要求，不被SUBTEL承認；除持有的任何中國核准外，仍須另行取得智利歸一化。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — telecom terminal equipment (China)
SRRC Radio Type Approval — radio equipment (China)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — listed product categories (China)
GB/T and YD/T standards — Chinese RF and telecom terminal technical requirements

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by SUBTEL. A distinct SUBTEL homologación certificate is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into Chile, regardless of any Chinese, CE, or FCC approvals already held. The SUBTEL process requires a technical file including laboratory test reports from an accredited or SUBTEL-recognised laboratory demonstrating compliance with Chilean RF and EMC limits. The SUBTEL homologación number must be marked on the product label in addition to any Chinese certification markings.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、工信部NAL和CCC核准不被SUBTEL承认。无论已持有何种中国、CE或FCC核准，向智利销售或进口的所有无线电和电信终端设备均须另行取得SUBTEL归一化证书。SUBTEL流程须提供技术文件，包括认可或SUBTEL认可实验室出具的证明符合智利无线电和EMC限值的测试报告。除中国认证标志外，产品标签上还须标注SUBTEL归一化编号。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、工信部NAL和CCC核准不被SUBTEL承認。無論已持有何種中國、CE或FCC核准，向智利銷售或進口的所有無線電和電信終端裝置均須另行取得SUBTEL歸一化證書。SUBTEL流程須提供技術文件，包括認可或SUBTEL認可實驗室出具的證明符合智利無線電和EMC限值的測試報告。除中國認證標誌外，產品標籤上還須標注SUBTEL歸一化編號。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SUBTEL homologación is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Chile under Ley 18.168. Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not recognised as substitutes. A SUBTEL certificate with homologación number must be obtained and marked on the product label. IEC/EN test reports may support the technical dossier but do not replace the Chilean homologación process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据Ley 18.168，SUBTEL归一化对在智利进口或销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备为强制要求。中国SRRC、工信部NAL、CE、FCC和CCC核准不被视为替代。须取得载有归一化编号的SUBTEL证书并在产品标签上标注。IEC/EN测试报告可支持技术档案，但不能替代智利归一化流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據Ley 18.168，SUBTEL歸一化對在智利進口或銷售的所有無線電和電信終端裝置為強制要求。中國SRRC、工信部NAL、CE、FCC和CCC核准不被視為替代。須取得載有歸一化編號的SUBTEL證書並在產品標籤上標注。IEC/EN測試報告可支持技術檔案，但不能替代智利歸一化流程。
